mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wf_definition (id, flow_key, flow_name, flow_version, flow_config, status, tenant_id, created_by, created_time, updated_by, updated_time, deleted, version) VALUES (#{id}, #{flowKey}, #{flowName}, #{flowVersion}, #{flowConfig}, #{status}, #{tenantId}, #{createdBy}, #{createdTime}, #{updatedBy}, #{updatedTime}, #{deleted}, #{version})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM wf_definition WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = FALSE
mapper.update: UPDATE wf_definition SET flow_key = #{flowKey}, flow_name = #{flowName}, flow_version = #{flowVersion}, flow_config = #{flowConfig}, status = #{status}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_time = #{updatedTime}, version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = FALSE
UPDATE wf_definition SET deleted = TRUE WHERE id = #{id}
